infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: This app uses the camera to take photos of your job.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: This app accesses your photos to upload job images.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: This app uses your location to find nearby tradespeople.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: This app uses your location to find nearby tradespeople.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: This app uses the microphone for voice messages.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow $(PRODUCT_NAME) to access your camera to take photos of your job.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow $(PRODUCT_NAME) to access your photos to upload job images.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow $(PRODUCT_NAME) to use your location to find nearby tradespeople.
